text:
RT @NASA: Fist bump! 👊 
 
The Artemis II crew is now under 35,000 miles from Earth. The astronauts are preparing the spacecraft for reentry…

Our Lab just posted a new research report from Zimran Ahmed about how the game industry is adapting to AI. He spoke to people at 20 different studios and found a wide range of approaches to adapt (or failures to adapt) to AI at the organizational level. https://t.co/3DmXL3y10f https://t.co/eSzhchcdeC

Damn we’re getting shockingly good AI movie trailers now.

Qasar Younis on how Applied Intuition uses books to mold company culture:

"We also read books as a company, as a leadership team, and then we invite the whole company to do it."

"Think about your company as this bespoke piece of clothing that you get made, and then you grow, https://t.co/Mn3BPyz9Xi

Anthropic 推出 Claude for Word 插件

Anthropic 刚刚发布了 Word 插件的测试版。装上之后，Claude 直接在 Word 侧边栏里工作，你选中一段文字、用自然语言描述想怎么改，它就会以 Word 原生的"修订模式"呈现修改结果，接受或拒绝都在 Word 自带的审阅面板里完成。

AI was never the problem.

Your prompts were.

Genspark just removed every excuse.

Now there’s nowhere to hide.

Watch what happens next.

Periodic Labs cofounder Liam Fedus on why so many physicists are working on AI:

"I think [physics is] a great way to think about the world. It's very principled, very hard-nosed scientists, very careful. And I think it's just such an incredible field. You have such high leverage https://t.co/mB9sVQu90D

Let’s connect with each other.

First (supervised) FSD approval in Europe!

Congratulations to the Tesla team and thank you to the regulatory authorities in the Netherlands for all the hard work required to make this happen.
RT @Tesla: FSD Supervised approved in the Netherlands 🇳🇱
RDW was extremely rigorous in their review
The Sun is ~everything
Testing Hermes

The Claude onboarding prompt that should exist but doesn't.

One prompt per day for 7 days. Each one built around your actual job. By Day 7, you have 7 reusable prompts you use every week.

Paste it into Claude. It asks 3 questions about your role, then builds the full plan. https://t.co/gR1YvjvC2t

Unlock all my prompts + skills:
https://t.co/C8Zzw2IMzE

.@pmarca on exposing yourself to risk:

https://t.co/HozyAn4zK5 https://t.co/z3y65t98h4

最近的新感悟是
人类的大脑是被语言塑造的
语言是大脑的雕刻刀
行动固然非常重要，但行动之后依然需要语言去总结、归因、抽象为认知
语言是改变大脑模型的不可获取的中间步骤
也是塑造群体叙事、雕刻群体大脑的唯一的手段
都说成王败寇
成王之后第一步就是写自己的史书
すごいね
